properties.Description: The state of being free from danger or threat.

properties.Title: AI
properties.Description: Artificial intelligence; the theory and development of computer systems able to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence.

properties.Title: Humanity
properties.Description: The human race; human beings collectively.

properties.Title: Education
properties.Description: The process of receiving or giving systematic instruction.

properties.Title: Experience

properties.Title: Wealth
properties.Description: An abundance of valuable possessions or money.

properties.Title: Health
properties.Description: The state of being free from illness or injury.

properties.Title: Power
properties.Description: The ability or capacity to do something or act in a particular way.

properties.Title: Love
properties.Description: An intense feeling of deep affection.

properties.Title: Technology
properties.Description: The application of scientific knowledge for practical purposes.

properties.Title: Nature
properties.Description: The physical world collectively, including plants, animals, the landscape, etc.

properties.Title: Art
properties.Description: The expression or application of human creative skill and imagination.

properties.Title: Commerce
